summary: Iteration 209 testing complete. All 4 new mechanics verified: (1) Orbital ring rotation with momentum/friction/snap-to-grid working - satellites rotate with idle drift and snap to top position, (2) Long-press inspect (500ms) on satellites opens SatelliteInspector overlay with Trinity View data, (3) CosmicPrescription wired with clickable frequency button (528Hz), Archives/Suanpan/Hub navigation buttons, (4) ActiveSatellite shows 'active' label when snapped to top position. All 13 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend features verified.

integration_issues.issue: Archives page shows '0 Entries' in sidebar - entries not loading despite API returning data. May be auth token timing issue.

action_items: Investigate Archives page entry list not loading - API returns data but frontend shows 0 entries

seed_data_creation: None - using existing archive entries from iteration 208
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 209 adds 4 new mechanics to Orbital Hub: (1) Ring rotation with momentum (FRICTION=0.94), snap-to-grid (nearest satellite snaps to top/-PI/2 when velocity < 0.015), and idle drift (IDLE_SPEED=0.04). Pointer events on containerRef handle drag. (2) Long-press (500ms) on ActiveSatellite opens SatelliteInspector overlay which fetches /api/archives/entry/{sat.id}. Only om-vedic, dao-chinese, qi-chinese, aleph-aramaic, ankh-egyptian, iching-hexagram have archive data - others show fallback message. (3) CosmicPrescription on dashboard has clickable frequency button (uses toggleFreq from MixerContext), plus Archives/Suanpan/Hub navigation buttons. (4) ActiveSatellite shows 'active' label when isSnapped=true. Key data-testids: orbital-hub-page, satellite-{id}, satellite-inspector, inspector-close, inspect-tab-{origin|synthesis|frequency}, cosmic-prescription, prescription-play-freq, prescription-open-archives, prescription-open-suanpan, prescription-open-hub. Note: Archives page sidebar shows 0 entries despite API working - may need investigation.
